description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing two jobs: stow and test. The stow job uses the debian:11 Docker image and runs apt-get -qq update; apt-get -y install git openssh-client stow then stow --adopt -t ~ */. The test job uses the alpine:3.18 image, sets PATH to /root/.cask/bin in a before_script, then runs apk update && apk add openssh make git curl python3 emacs openssh bash git stow, clones https://github.com/cask/cask ~/.cask, runs stow --adopt -t ~ */, and finally executes ./.circleci/emacs.sh. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
